description: Required pre-flight document is absent from the fixed commit.
evidence: git cat-file -e returned missing; AGENTS Step 0 mandates reading it before any change.
production_impact: Gate A cannot be evidenced; later completion claims are procedurally invalid.
test_evidence: No CI assertion for required pre-flight documents.
notes: Fixed commit evidence only.

description: Required repository instruction file is absent from the fixed commit.
evidence: git cat-file -e returned missing; AGENTS Step 0 names this file explicitly.
production_impact: Gate A cannot be completed as written.
test_evidence: No CI assertion for required pre-flight documents.
notes: Fixed commit evidence only.

description: The fixed commit fails cargo fmt --check across production files.
evidence: Clean git archive execution exited FMT_EXIT=1 and emitted extensive diffs including main.rs, push_templates.rs, trading modules and other scoped files.
production_impact: Implementation gate is not ready; release evidence cannot be valid.
test_evidence: cargo fmt --check on clean archive: exit 1.
notes: Bench diffs also existed, but this row is grounded in scoped production files.

description: The fixed commit fails cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings.
evidence: Clean archive execution ended with 335 errors, including redundant field names, unused imports, unreachable patterns, deprecated APIs, dead code and test warnings.
production_impact: Mandatory implementation gate is failed; warnings can hide real defects in live trading code.
test_evidence: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings: CLIPPY_EXIT=101, 335 errors.
notes: Representative first production error shown; aggregate is a single mandatory-gate failure.

description: The mandatory compliance entrypoint calls two scripts that do not exist in the fixed commit.
evidence: Lines 48-49 invoke check_no_silent_fallback_push.sh and check_no_silent_fallback_global.sh; run_check marks either missing script as OVERALL_EXIT=1.
production_impact: Gate C deterministically fails on a clean checkout.
test_evidence: bash tools/compliance/check.sh on clean archive: COMPLIANCE_EXIT=1 with both missing-script errors.
notes: The trailing || true does not reset OVERALL_EXIT.

description: Coverage gate enforces 60%, not AGENTS-required 80% global and 95% core, and excludes major production paths.
evidence: Workflow uses --fail-under 60 and ignores src/bin/*, src/agent/* and sector_monitor.rs.
production_impact: Critical trading/data links can merge far below required coverage or with no coverage at all.
test_evidence: Workflow comments acknowledge targets but executable command enforces only 60%.
notes: Direct executable-policy mismatch.

description: Primary CI omits cargo fmt --check, clippy -D warnings and full cargo test.
evidence: It runs cargo build and cargo test --lib only.
production_impact: Non-library binaries and integration tests can be broken while CI remains green.
test_evidence: Clean archive independently fails fmt/clippy; workflow would not catch either.
notes: AGENTS Step 2 requires all three commands.

description: PR evidence gate checks only that any commit message contains one Refs token, not the mandatory PR fields.
evidence: No enforcement exists here for Data-Redlines, OldModules, Threshold-Proof, Business-Rules or Rollback.
production_impact: PRs can be declared merge-ready without required traceability and rollback evidence.
test_evidence: Workflow shell condition only greps git log for Refs.
notes: AGENTS §3.1 requires all fields in PR description.

description: Freshness gate exits success when the production database is absent or sqlite3 is unavailable.
evidence: Both cases print SKIP and exit 0.
production_impact: A missing/unreadable data source can pass the strict merge blocker instead of failing explicitly.
test_evidence: tests/test_data_freshness_check.rs:28-35 codifies missing DB as success.
notes: Contradicts AGENTS §2.4.1 strict merge blocker.

description: Freshness calculation uses calendar-day subtraction, not trading days with holiday exclusion.
evidence: Python computes raw date difference and line 68 compares >1; there is no exchange calendar.
production_impact: Valid holiday/weekend data may fail and stale holiday-adjacent data may be misclassified.
test_evidence: No holiday/weekend boundary test in the scoped freshness test.
notes: Comment claims trading days but implementation is calendar days.

description: Fake-implementation gate checks one narrow regex and mere existence of one test file.
evidence: It only searches update_.*result.*0.0.*false and never examines verify/save/notify/push/sync/reconcile log-only bodies.
production_impact: Known log-only push implementations pass this checker.
test_evidence: Clean compliance run printed check_fake_impl PASS despite src/broker.rs log-only push methods.
notes: Direct false-negative demonstrated.

description: Existing-file BR omissions and registered PENDING rules are warnings, not blockers.
evidence: Lines 104-108 fail only new files; lines 113-120 warn for PENDING entries.
production_impact: Undocumented or explicitly unimplemented business rules can pass Gate C.
test_evidence: Registry contains numerous 待实现 entries; checker design labels them WARN.
notes: Contradicts MUST/blocking language.

description: Design-contradiction gate silently passes missing configuration and checks only one threshold/clamp relationship.
evidence: Missing event_risk_score_threshold exits 0; all other config/code thresholds are outside its model.
production_impact: Threshold drift outside one event-risk field can merge undetected.
test_evidence: Existing tests exercise this narrow script rather than global config/spec linkage.
notes: AGENTS §2.9 also requires bidirectional spec/config references.

description: Checker validates a different registry from the canonical docs/business_rules.md required by AGENTS.
evidence: RULES_FILE defaults to docs/业务规则清单-registry.md.
production_impact: Changes to the mandated canonical business-rules file can be ignored by Gate C.
test_evidence: No test asserts canonical-path enforcement.
notes: Both files exist and contain divergent representations.

description: Production quote-provider default is an explicit mock returning price 0 and empty sector.
evidence: MockQuoteProvider returns 0.0/empty; ensure_default_quote_provider registers it when no provider exists.
production_impact: Trading and scoring paths can use fabricated missing values instead of explicit source errors.
test_evidence: Tests only assert mock/noop behavior; monitor startup calls ensure_default_quote_provider.
notes: The production abstraction returns bare f64/String so errors cannot propagate.

description: Broker push implementations named push_st_type/push_quote only log and do not operate on a target data source.
evidence: QmtBroker, PublicDataBroker and NoopBroker bodies contain only log calls.
production_impact: Operators may believe broker data was pushed although no state or external source changed.
test_evidence: test_noop_broker_does_not_panic validates non-operation rather than target effects.
notes: Exact function names are covered by AGENTS §2.8.

description: IB broker placeholder returns 0.0 price and empty sector instead of an explicit unavailable-source error.
evidence: Comments state real production call is simplified away; fetch_price returns 0.0 and get_sector returns empty.
production_impact: Any caller can treat absent IB connectivity as numeric market data.
test_evidence: Unit tests assert zero and empty are expected.
notes: Production module is not cfg(test)-gated.

description: Health check reports success using mocked checks and excludes quote-provider failure from all_ok.
evidence: Bus check only obtains singletons; perf and quote checks return true; all_ok ignores quote_provider.
production_impact: Live system can advertise healthy while no quotes or recent performance data exist.
test_evidence: health_status_all_ok_with_quote_warn explicitly asserts all_ok when quote_provider=false.
notes: Health signal is operationally misleading.

description: Multiple real news feed adapters downgrade source errors to successful empty vectors.
evidence: Jin10, WallStreetCN, CLS, Weibo, Gelonghui, KCB and GovPolicy call await.unwrap_or_default then return Ok.
production_impact: Outages are indistinguishable from no news and suppress trading catalysts silently.
test_evidence: No failure-propagation test for these wrappers.
notes: One shared anti-pattern across seven concrete adapters.

description: Six registered news feeds are skeletons that always return Ok(empty).
evidence: GovCn, MIIT, EarningsCalendar, Consensus, MarketAction and AnalystViews return empty; initialization registers them.
production_impact: Production source inventory overstates coverage and silently loses policy/earnings/action/view events.
test_evidence: news_aggregator_init test only checks Vec type/count, not real events.
notes: EmAnnouncement separately swallows errors at line 205.

description: NewsAggregator production tick stops at logging/counting and has no real ranker/outcome/catalyst consumer.
evidence: Comments explicitly say later integration and future rank_events.
production_impact: Module existence and tests do not constitute live feature integration.
test_evidence: tick test has no assertion on downstream side effects.
notes: Violates Completion Rule production-consumer requirement.

description: Live T-14/T-15 trade pipeline is a stub that always returns no events while scheduled dispatchers call it.
evidence: fetch_pending_trade_events returns Vec::new; main.rs schedules dispatch_trade_pipeline_orders at 10139.
production_impact: Order/fill notifications never occur despite a live scheduled path.
test_evidence: --test template coverage treats skipped dispatchers as acceptable.
notes: Documented as stub in production source.

description: Required pre-save veto always returns true.
evidence: veto_check_auction_anomaly warns STUB and unconditionally true; caller relies on it before save_prediction.
production_impact: Auction anomalies bypass promised risk rules BR-005/006/008.
test_evidence: No test proves a real veto can deny.
notes: Code comment itself says actual veto is future work.

description: Launch-gate metric computation hardcodes Calmar ratio to 0.0 because it is unimplemented.
evidence: Shadow-to-Gray requires calmar_ratio >=1.0, making DB-derived transition impossible.
production_impact: Rollout state machine cannot reach its documented transition from real DB metrics.
test_evidence: Transition tests inject synthetic Calmar values and do not test metrics_from_db reaching Gray.
notes: A required metric is permanently disconnected.

description: Daily push-limit input is hardcoded to zero, making the governance deny branch unreachable.
evidence: today_pushed_count: 0 with TODO for store wiring.
production_impact: Daily push count cannot enforce the registered cap.
test_evidence: tests/ranking.rs explicitly says the daily <=5 limit is not implemented.
notes: Concrete live governance bypass.

description: The purported BR-005 test is a placeholder that asserts the feature is not implemented.
evidence: limit_implemented=false followed by assert!(!limit_implemented).
production_impact: Green tests can be cited while the business rule remains absent.
test_evidence: Test name includes NOT_IMPLEMENTED_placeholder.
notes: Direct self-admission.

description: Simulated execution gateway enforces only 60-second ID dedup and omits the other mandatory order guards.
evidence: open/close write directly without cash/1m cap, lot size, positive quantity, daily price limits or >=500k confirmation.
production_impact: Invalid or oversized orders can be persisted as Filled.
test_evidence: Tests cover dedup only; no tests for the five missing guards.
notes: 60-second dedup itself is correctly present at lines 110-139.

description: Paper evaluation can mark an order Filled when quote data is absent or price/quantity is invalid.
evidence: Slippage is skipped when quote_price<=0 and normal path fills at signal.price; no price>0 or lot-size validation exists.
production_impact: Bad/missing price data can produce apparent executions.
test_evidence: Unit fixtures use valid values and do not assert rejection for zero price/non-lot quantity.
notes: Explicit violation of fail-closed data and order handling.

description: Portfolio state fabricates 1,000,000 total value and 30% cash and skips risk checks on source failure.
evidence: Hardcoded total/cash assumptions and (0,0,0) failure return feed pre_trade_check.
production_impact: Orders may pass risk checks using invented account values.
test_evidence: risk_adapter test permits total_value=0 paths; no real-account reconciliation test.
notes: AGENTS §2.1 requires real account position/cash/net value.

description: Sell signal falls back missing quote to average cost, forces quantity to at least 100 without lot rounding, and hardcodes all market-status flags false.
evidence: current_price unwrap_or(avg_cost); quantity.max(100); limit/suspension flags false.
production_impact: Missing market data can become a fabricated executable sell at a non-market price.
test_evidence: Tests are unit-level and do not exercise missing quote against live status.
notes: Multiple fields jointly create one fabricated execution decision.

description: paper_trades schema lacks CHECK constraints for price>0 and quantity>0/multiple-of-100.
evidence: price and quantity are only NOT NULL.
production_impact: Direct SQL or buggy code can persist invalid paper orders even if application checks are later added.
test_evidence: No migration-level constraint test.
notes: Defense-in-depth absent for a trading table.

description: --test intentionally leaves the environment in production mode.
evidence: Comments say --test does not set STOCK_ENV_MODE and default prod is used.
production_impact: Test execution can access real holdings and bypass the required physical/logical separation.
test_evidence: No test proves test mode rejects real symbols.
notes: Direct contradiction of AGENTS §2.5.

description: E2E path seeds stock_position with a non-TEST_CODE symbol.
evidence: SQL inserts code 999999 and *ST_E2E_TEST into the production holdings table shape.
production_impact: Test artifacts are not identifiable by required TEST_CODE prefix and can contaminate live records.
test_evidence: No production rejection test for this symbol.
notes: The fixed commit contains this literal SQL.

description: Production AuditDispatcher performs only stdout logging plus an in-memory counter.
evidence: Comments state logging is the only side effect; no durable, tamper-resistant store exists.
production_impact: Push audit evidence disappears with process/log rotation and cannot support five-year traceability.
test_evidence: Tests assert counter increments and stdout path, not durable persistence.
notes: Literal audit component contradicts AGENTS §2.7 retention/tamper requirements.

description: Dispatcher audit JSONL is ordinary append-only-by-convention storage and is deleted after seven days.
evidence: rotate_dispatcher_logs is called with 7 and remove_file deletes older files; writes/errors are ignored.
production_impact: Critical push decisions are neither tamper-resistant nor retained >=5 years.
test_evidence: No integrity-chain or five-year retention test.
notes: Seven days is explicit.

description: Sina parser converts malformed prices/volume to 0 and malformed dates to today.
evidence: parse().unwrap_or(0.0) and date unwrap_or_else(Local::now).
production_impact: Corrupt source rows become plausible dated records and can enter computation.
test_evidence: No malformed-row rejection test proving explicit error.
notes: Direct fabrication rather than blank/warn/error.

description: Baostock K-line parser converts malformed dates to today and numeric fields to zero.
evidence: NaiveDate parse fallback and six parse().unwrap_or(0.0) calls.
production_impact: Bad rows are silently transformed and may distort signals.
test_evidence: No malformed-row rejection test.
notes: Direct construction of KlineData from fabricated defaults.

description: Nullable persisted OHLCV and percentage fields are silently filled with zero.
evidence: stock_daily_to_kline calls unwrap_or(0.0) for every core field.
production_impact: Missing database values become computable market data.
test_evidence: No test requires warning/error on null core fields.
notes: Violates missing-field rule before computation.

description: Tencent quote parser defaults malformed price, close, valuation, volume and amount fields to zero.
evidence: Multiple parse().unwrap_or(0.0) calls construct RealtimeQuote.
production_impact: A malformed live quote can look like a zero-price market state instead of failing explicitly.
test_evidence: No malformed-quote rejection test.
notes: Live quote freshness/safety depends on these fields.

description: Yahoo missing quote/index/FX fields are converted to zero and then rendered as flat market conditions.
evidence: Quote Options unwrap_or(0.0); missing indexes/FX also default zero and lead to 持平 text.
production_impact: Missing upstream data is represented as a market fact.
test_evidence: Tests do not distinguish absent data from genuine zero movement.
notes: Conflates absence with numerical zero.

description: Unavailable market cap, turnover, PE and PB are emitted as numeric zero rather than left absent.
evidence: Code comments say source lacks fields, then builds RealtimeQuote with 0.0 values.
production_impact: Downstream scoring can treat missing fundamentals as real zero values.
test_evidence: Network tests only print returned data and are not CI-enforced.
notes: Known absence is encoded as data.

description: Real R-02 market review converts fetch/task failures into all-zero market evidence.
evidence: Nested unwrap_or(Ok((0,0,0))) and unwrap_or((0,0,0)) feed MarketStageEvidence.
production_impact: A source outage can be interpreted as neutral market state and pushed.
test_evidence: No failure-path test asserts explicit denial/error.
notes: Production function is named *_real.

description: Default validators pass when required fact objects or fields are entirely missing.
evidence: Both validators only inspect Some(...) and return Ok otherwise.
production_impact: Reports can claim validation despite absent financial/research facts.
test_evidence: Unit coverage does not require MissingField for absent facts.
notes: Missing data is not blank/warn/error.

description: Public opt-in validators are explicit no-op stubs that always return Ok.
evidence: ConceptLinkageValidator and DividendTaxValidator implement validate as Ok(()).
production_impact: Any caller adding them receives false validation assurance.
test_evidence: Default-engine test only proves they are not auto-registered.
notes: Dormant today, but callable public API.

description: Test assertion is tautological and cannot fail.
evidence: assert!(map.is_empty() || !map.is_empty()).
production_impact: Regression in exclusion-map behavior would remain undetected.
test_evidence: The assertion is logically always true.
notes: No behavioral oracle.

description: Test assertion is tautological and cannot fail.
evidence: assert!(positions.is_empty() || !positions.is_empty()).
production_impact: Portfolio-store regressions can pass unnoticed.
test_evidence: The assertion is logically always true.
notes: No behavioral oracle.

description: Risk-limit test assertion is tautological and cannot fail.
evidence: assert!(v.is_empty() || !v.is_empty()).
production_impact: Position-limit regressions can pass unnoticed.
test_evidence: The assertion is logically always true.
notes: Safety-critical test checks only non-panic.

description: Real-network IPO-date validation is ignored by default CI.
evidence: #[ignore] on the only real network test.
production_impact: Live data-source behavior is not release evidence.
test_evidence: Ignored test requires manual invocation.
notes: AGENTS Gate D requires live data validation.

description: Real fallback-path async/sync validation is ignored by default CI.
evidence: Network-dependent integration test is #[ignore].
production_impact: Production fallback can regress without release detection.
test_evidence: Ignored test requires manual invocation.
notes: No equivalent non-ignored live test found.

description: Direct Baostock post-close validation is ignored.
evidence: Test is #[ignore].
production_impact: Fallback availability is unverified in normal gates.
test_evidence: Ignored test requires manual invocation.
notes: Live source validation absent from CI.

description: All three-source consistency/price sanity acceptance tests are ignored.
evidence: Three tokio tests carry #[ignore].
production_impact: Cross-source reconciliation and extreme-gap behavior are not release-gated.
test_evidence: CI workflow does not run --ignored.
notes: This file describes itself as end-to-end acceptance.

description: Freshness test requires missing DB to pass instead of treating it as a blocker.
evidence: It asserts output.status.success() for /nonexistent/path/fake.db.
production_impact: Test suite entrenches the unsafe skip semantics.
test_evidence: This test passes only when the violating behavior remains.
notes: Direct contradiction of strict merge blocker.

description: PushRecord is explicitly reserved for a future PushApplicationService and has no production persistence consumer.
evidence: Comment names future boundary; fixed-commit grep finds usages only in its module/tests.
production_impact: Replay/audit infrastructure is not integrated into a live durable path.
test_evidence: Tests validate serialization only.
notes: Completion Rule rejects speculative infrastructure without a consumer.

description: Pre-open news template always supplies an empty news_pairs field despite a TODO to integrate news_monitor.
evidence: Builder hardcodes Vec::new; test at line 7780 asserts it stays empty.
production_impact: Documented news-catalyst content is absent from production output.
test_evidence: Existing test codifies empty integration.
notes: Concrete code-without-integration gap.

description: Configuration declares multiple fields obsolete because behavior is hardcoded in Rust.
evidence: Comments state schedule, cross-source, ST profit/loss and lookback values are hardcoded or unused.
production_impact: Operators can change config expecting effect while production behavior remains unchanged; spec/config single-source traceability is broken.
test_evidence: Design checker covers only event_risk_score_threshold and cannot detect these fields.
notes: Self-documented drift in configuration.

description: Compliance CI runs a hand-picked subset of integration tests rather than full cargo test.
evidence: Command names seven test binaries and omits the rest of tests/ plus all bin tests.
production_impact: Broken historical features can merge if their test target is outside the allowlist.
test_evidence: Primary ci.yml also runs only --lib.
notes: AGENTS requires cargo test, not a curated subset.

description: Announcement feed converts fetch failure to a successful empty event list.
evidence: fetch_announcements(...).await.unwrap_or_default() followed by Ok(events).
production_impact: Announcement outages silently remove earnings events.
test_evidence: No adapter failure-propagation test.
notes: Separate production source from the seven wrappers in STD-019.

description: Operator authentication is opt-in and default-disabled, while no order path implements mandatory secondary confirmation for >=500,000 RMB.
evidence: load_auth_config defaults required=false and require_monitor_operator_auth returns Ok when disabled.
production_impact: High-value order confirmation cannot be guaranteed by the only operator-auth gate.
test_evidence: Tests explicitly assert defaults_false.
notes: Auth is not itself the specified secondary-confirm mechanism; this finding records the absence/default bypass as corroborating evidence.

description: Audit directory creation and file writes discard errors.
evidence: create_dir_all(...).ok() and let _ = write_all(...) suppress persistence failures.
production_impact: System can continue as if audit succeeded with no trace.
test_evidence: No failure-path test for unwritable audit directory.
notes: Critical audit failure must be explicit.

description: Required live-binary completion evidence is absent from executable CI gates.
evidence: CLAUDE requires release monitor build and monitor --test end-to-end path evidence; workflows run neither.
production_impact: Features can be declared complete without proving the production binary uses them.
test_evidence: No workflow command runs cargo build --release --bin monitor or monitor --test.
notes: Repository rule, not a claim that local manual evidence can never exist.

description: The fixed commit fails full cargo test because v14_e2e calls Dispatcher::dispatch with a missing third argument.
evidence: Clean archive cargo test --quiet reports E0061: method takes 3 arguments but 2 supplied; Option<&str> is missing.
production_impact: The repository cannot satisfy the mandatory test gate and the isolated e2e binary is not buildable.
test_evidence: cargo test --quiet: exit 101.
notes: Reproduced from a clean git archive of the fixed commit.

description: Repository ignore rules exclude .github, docs, reports and tools by default even though AGENTS requires all process outputs to be tracked through Git and PR.
evidence: .gitignore lines 4, 9, 11 and 13 ignore the directories that hold workflows, reports, architecture/spec documents and compliance scripts.
production_impact: New mandatory evidence and checks can remain workspace-only unless force-added, so a local-looking completion state need not exist in the audited commit.
test_evidence: No gate asserts that newly created process outputs are tracked rather than ignored.
notes: Existing force-added files do not remove the default exclusion for future outputs.

description: Operational dashboard is configured around a 60-second quote-provider TTL and refreshes only every 30 seconds, inconsistent with the mandatory 5-second realtime-quote freshness target.
evidence: Panel 6 is titled QuoteProvider current price (60s TTL); dashboard refresh is 30s and exposes price without a quote-age/freshness alarm.
production_impact: Operators cannot use this dashboard to detect or enforce the 5-second stale-quote red line.
test_evidence: No dashboard/config test asserts a 5-second freshness alert.
notes: Monitoring evidence corroborates the production quote fallback/freshness findings.
